title: 品牌徽标设计图
description: A bright, summery commercial product photography shot featuring a refreshing beverage on a weathered wooden table. In the sharp foreground, there is 1 tall glass filled with a golden, bubbly iced drink garnished with 1 l
prompt_raw: A bright, summery commercial product photography shot featuring a refreshing beverage on a weathered wooden table. In the sharp foreground, there is 1 tall glass filled with a golden, bubbly iced drink garnished with 1 lemon slice and a sprig of rosemary, sitting next to 1 silver aluminum can covered in cold condensation. The can prominently displays the English text TOKYO HIGHBALL below a small gold star logo, featuring a graphic of the drink itself and the Japanese text "アルコール分 7%" near the bottom. To the right of the can, 2 cut lemon wedges rest on the table. In the softly blurred background, a sunny beach scene unfolds with sparkling turquoise water and a clear blue sky. Standing to the left in the background is 1 young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white sleeveless top and a light blue skirt, looking out toward the ocean. Floating elegantly in the sky above the scene is the Japanese text 夏、これがいい。. The overall lighting is radiant and inviting, with sparkling bokeh and lens flares emphasizing the crisp, cold, and refreshing atmosphere of a perfect summer day.
prompt_preview: A bright, summery commercial product photography shot featuring a refreshing beverage on a weathered wooden table. In the sharp foreground, there is 1 tall glass filled with a golden, bubbly iced drink garnished with 1 l
prompt_display_cn:
案例「product name」属于品牌视觉。这是一张品牌视觉/Logo 规范类案例，重点在标志、字体、色彩、图标系统、应用物料和品牌气质的统一呈现。适合改成品牌提案板、Logo 组合规范、视觉识别系统、产品品牌页。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A bright, summery commercial 商品 photography shot featuring a refreshing beverage on a weathered wooden table. In the sharp foreground, there is 1 tall glass filled with a golden, bubbly iced drink garnished with 1 lemon slice and a sprig of rosemary, sitting next to 1 silver aluminum can covered in cold condensation. The can prominently displays the 英文文字 【商品 name：TOKYO HIGHBALL】 below a small gold star 标志, featuring a graphic of the drink itself and the 日文文字 "アルコール分 7%" near the bottom. To the right of the can, 2 cut lemon wedges rest on the table. In the softly blurred 背景, a sunny beach scene unfolds with sparkling turquoise water and a clear blue sky. Standing to the left in the 背景 is 1 young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white sleeveless top and a 光线 blue skirt, looking out toward the ocean. Floating elegantly in the sky above the scene is the 日文文字 【catchphrase：夏、これがいい。】. The overall 光线ing is radiant and inviting, with sparkling bokeh and lens flares emphasizing the crisp, c
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【品牌名称】的品牌视觉规范展示板。

品牌定位：
品牌属于【行业/领域】，核心气质是【品牌气质】，目标用户为【目标用户】。

Logo 区域：
展示主 Logo、反白 Logo、横版/竖版组合、图形标识和安全留白规范。Logo 文字为【Logo文字】。

色彩与字体：
展示品牌主色【主色】、辅助色【辅助色】、背景色【背景色】，并展示中文/英文字体规范：【字体风格】。

图标与视觉元素：
设计一组统一风格的品牌图标，用于【应用场景】。加入品牌纹理、辅助图形或视觉符号：【辅助元素】。

应用展示：
展示【应用物料1】、【应用物料2】、【应用物料3】等真实落地场景，例如 App 图标、网页、手机界面、名片、包装、杯子或海报。

整体要求：
版式高级、干净、有品牌提案感，文字清晰，像专业设计公司出品的视觉规范板。
variables_json: [{"key":"field_1","label":"品牌名称","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入品牌名称","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_2","label":"行业/领域","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入行业/领域","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_3","label":"品牌气质","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入品牌气质","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_4","label":"目标用户","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入目标用户","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"logo","label":"Logo文字","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入Logo文字","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_6","label":"主色","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主色","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_7","label":"辅助色","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入辅助色","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_8","label":"背景色","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入背景色","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_9","label":"字体风格","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入字体风格","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_10","label":"应用场景","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入应用场景","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_11","label":"辅助元素","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入辅助元素","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"1","label":"应用物料1","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入应用物料1","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"2","label":"应用物料2","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入应用物料2","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"3","label":"应用物料3","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入应用物料3","required":true,"type":"text"}]
